info.title: Platform CASE 1.1 Framework Graph API
info.summary: Generated CASE framework graph API schemas from the structured CASE dictionary source.
info.description: This OpenAPI document is generated from dictionary/case-core.v1.json. It documents the planned CASE framework graph projection API for standards, competencies, associations, definitions, rubrics, and operational statuses. It is not a formal CASE certification claim and is not executable on GitHub Pages until a backend is added.

servers.description: Portal host; CASE endpoints are planned documentation until backend runtime exists.

CasePackage.description: The full bundle for one framework: root document, items, relationship edges, definitions, and rubrics.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this CASE package.

documentId.description: The root framework document in this package.

sourceSystem.description: The standards publisher, state agency, institution, or importer that supplied the package.

packageUri.description: A URI for the package or import source when one is available.

importedAt.description: When the platform imported this CASE package.

validationStatus.description: Whether the CASE package passed platform validation.

x-valueDescriptions.pending: The platform has not checked the package yet.
x-valueDescriptions.invalid: The package failed validation and should not be trusted for alignment.
x-valueDescriptions.warning: The package is usable but has non-blocking issues that should be reviewed.

CaseDocument.description: The root document for a standards, competency, course-code, or skill framework.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this framework document.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for this framework document.

uri.description: A web identifier for this framework document.

frameworkType.description: What kind of framework this is.

x-valueDescriptions.competencyFramework: A framework of competencies or skills.
x-valueDescriptions.courseCodes: A framework used to publish course codes.
x-valueDescriptions.workforceSkills: A framework of workforce skills or occupational competencies.
x-valueDescriptions.localFramework: A district, school, or institution-specific framework.

caseVersion.description: The CASE version used by the document.

x-valueDescriptions.1.1: The CASE 1.1 framework and competency exchange model.

creator.description: The organization with authority over the framework.

title.description: The name of the framework document.

description.description: A summary of what the framework covers.

subject.description: Subject labels such as Mathematics, Reading, or Biology.

language.description: Default language used in the framework text.

publisherVersion.description: The publisher's revision or version label.

adoptionStatus.description: The publication or adoption status of the framework.

x-valueDescriptions.draft: The framework is being developed and may change.
x-valueDescriptions.adopted: The framework is officially adopted or active.
x-valueDescriptions.retired: The framework is no longer active for new use.
x-valueDescriptions.superseded: The framework has been replaced by another version.

officialSourceUrl.description: A link to the human-readable official source document.

licenseUri.description: A link to legal permissions for using the framework.

lastChangeDateTime.description: When the publisher last changed this framework document.

CaseItem.description: One node in the framework, such as a standard, competency, skill, objective, course code, strand, domain, or cluster.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this framework item.

documentId.description: The framework document this item belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for this framework item.

uri.description: A web identifier for this framework item.

humanCodingScheme.description: The short code people see in standards documents.

fullStatement.description: The complete text of the standard, competency, skill, objective, or grouping statement.

abbreviatedStatement.description: A shortened version of the full statement.

alternativeLabel.description: Another label the publisher uses for this kind of item.

itemType.description: Publisher label for what kind of item this is.

x-valueDescriptions.domain: A broad grouping inside a framework.
x-valueDescriptions.strand: A major learning strand or category.
x-valueDescriptions.cluster: A group of related standards or skills.
x-valueDescriptions.standard: A statement of what learners should know or do.
x-valueDescriptions.competency: A demonstrated capability or skill area.
x-valueDescriptions.courseCode: A course-code item in a CASE framework.

itemTypeUri.description: Linked-data identifier for the item type.

conceptKeywords.description: Topic keywords connected to the item.

educationLevel.description: Intended grade, education level, or instructional level.

listEnumeration.description: The item's visible position in a list or outline.

licenseUri.description: License that applies to this item.

CaseAssociation.description: A relationship edge between framework documents or items.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this association.

documentId.description: The framework document this association belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for this relationship.

uri.description: A web identifier for this relationship.

associationType.description: What kind of relationship this is.

x-valueDescriptions.isChildOf: The origin item is a child of the destination item.
x-valueDescriptions.isPeerOf: The origin item is a peer of the destination item.
x-valueDescriptions.isPartOf: The origin item is included in the destination item.
x-valueDescriptions.exactMatchOf: The origin item is equivalent to the destination item.
x-valueDescriptions.precedes: The origin item comes before the destination item.
x-valueDescriptions.isRelatedTo: The origin item is related to the destination item in a general way.
x-valueDescriptions.replacedBy: The origin item has been replaced by the destination item.
x-valueDescriptions.exemplar: The destination is an example of the origin.
x-valueDescriptions.hasSkillLevel: The destination defines a skill or difficulty level for the origin.
x-valueDescriptions.isTranslationOf: The destination is a translation of the origin.

originNodeUri.description: The item or document where the relationship starts.

destinationNodeUri.description: The item or document where the relationship points.

sequenceNumber.description: The display or processing order for this relationship.

associationGroupingUri.description: A group label or URI for related associations.

CaseDefinition.description: A set of reusable lookup definitions used by a framework.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this definition set.

documentId.description: The framework document this definition set belongs to.

conceptCount.description: How many concept definitions are present.

subjectCount.description: How many subject definitions are present.

itemTypeCount.description: How many item type definitions are present.

licenseCount.description: How many license definitions are present.

CaseConcept.description: A topic or idea addressed by the framework.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this concept.

documentId.description: The framework document this concept belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the concept.

uri.description: A web identifier for the concept.

hierarchyCode.description: The publisher's code showing where the concept fits in a concept hierarchy.

CaseSubject.description: An academic or topical subject used by the framework.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this subject.

documentId.description: The framework document this subject belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the subject.

uri.description: A web identifier for the subject.

hierarchyCode.description: The publisher's code for where the subject fits in a subject hierarchy.

CaseItemType.description: A definition explaining what kind of framework item something is.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this item type.

documentId.description: The framework document this item type belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the item type.

uri.description: A web identifier for the item type.

hierarchyCode.description: The publisher's code for where the item type fits in a hierarchy.

typeCode.description: A normalized item type code used by the platform.

x-valueDescriptions.domain: A broad grouping inside a framework.
x-valueDescriptions.strand: A major learning strand or category.
x-valueDescriptions.cluster: A group of related standards or skills.
x-valueDescriptions.standard: A statement of what learners should know or do.
x-valueDescriptions.competency: A demonstrated capability or skill area.
x-valueDescriptions.courseCode: A course-code item in a CASE framework.

lastChangeDateTime.description: When the item type last changed.

CaseLicense.description: A definition of permissions for using a framework, item, rubric, or related content.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this license.

documentId.description: The framework document this license belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the license record.

uri.description: A web identifier for the license record.

licenseText.description: The legal text or a reference to legal text for the license.

lastChangeDateTime.description: When the license record last changed.

CaseAssociationGrouping.description: A label for a set of associations so people can understand why those relationships belong together.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this association grouping.

documentId.description: The framework document this grouping belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the association group.

uri.description: A web identifier for the association group.

CaseRubric.description: A rubric describing criteria and performance levels for judging work or mastery.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this rubric.

documentId.description: The framework document this rubric belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the rubric.

uri.description: A web identifier for the rubric.

CaseRubricCriterion.description: One thing being judged in a rubric, such as reasoning, fluency, accuracy, evidence, or collaboration.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this rubric criterion.

rubricId.description: The rubric this criterion belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the criterion.

uri.description: A web identifier for the criterion.

category.description: A label used to group criteria.

caseItemUri.description: The standard, competency, or skill this criterion connects to.

weight.description: How much this criterion counts in scoring.

position.description: Display order of this criterion in the rubric.

CaseRubricCriterionLevel.description: One performance level for a rubric criterion, such as beginning, developing, proficient, or advanced.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this criterion level.

criterionId.description: The criterion this level belongs to.

identifier.description: The official CASE UUID for the level.

uri.description: A web identifier for the level.

quality.description: The label for the performance level.

x-valueDescriptions.beginning: Early or limited evidence of the criterion.
x-valueDescriptions.developing: Partial or emerging evidence of the criterion.
x-valueDescriptions.advanced: Strong or extended evidence of the criterion.

feedback.description: Pre-written feedback or guidance for this level.

CaseApiStatus.description: Operational status information for failed or partial CASE service operations.

id.description: The platform's stable ID for this status record.

operationId.description: The import, sync, or API operation this status belongs to.

imsxCodeMajor.description: Broad result of the CASE API request.

x-valueDescriptions.processing: The operation is still being processed.
x-valueDescriptions.unsupported: The requested operation or feature is not supported.

imsxSeverity.description: Whether the status is informational, warning, or error.

imsxCodeMinor.description: More specific status details from the service.

x-unsupported-or-deferred.reason: Requires official conformance testing and certification process beyond generated dictionary artifacts.
Needs a hosted database, validation service, auth, and tenant/shared-reference policy.
Extensions are preserved as governed metadata, but not promoted to core fields until intentionally modeled.
Version comparison and merge tooling should be implemented after persistent backend storage exists.
